args.sql: SELECT teigid, geom FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '4250' AND teigid IN (SELECT teigid FROM (SELECT teigid, COUNT(*) FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig JOIN arealressurskart_ar50_gis.ar50 ON ST_Intersects(matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig.geom, arealressurskart_ar50_gis.ar50.geom) GROUP BY teigid) AS sub WHERE COUNT >= 1) ORDER BY teigid ASC LIMIT 10
